mnemonics: Cooperate to Cooperate, Defect to Defect: C:D
Tit For Tat: Cooperate First, Defect After Defected
keyPoints: In infinitely repeated Prisoner's dilemma, both players defect to achieve the Nash equilibrium
If one player defects, the other player defects back to maintain the equilibrium
Players should always be on the lookout for the other player's past behavior to determine the optimal action
